evaluators.name: Cheapest Full-Leg Wax at Specific Time Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked the cheapest qualifying full-leg waxing service (duration ≥45 min) at next Wednesday 2:30 PM and added it to the current cart.

evaluators.name: Custom Session 80–100 Minutes Under $150 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user built and booked a custom waxing session (in cart) with 1 major area and 2–3 smaller areas, total duration 80–100 minutes, total price under $150.

evaluators.name: Brazilian+Underarm Package Under $120 Next Week Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked, into the current cart, the lowest-priced package that includes both Brazilian and underarm, costs under $120, lasts at least 60 minutes, and is scheduled next week between 10 AM and 4 PM.

evaluators.name: Three Saturday Eyebrow Appointments Same Technician Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked three separate Saturday eyebrow waxing appointments within the next three months, between 9–11 AM, all with the same technician, and added them to the current cart.

evaluators.name: Same-Day Men’s Chest & Back Custom Session After 5 PM Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a same-day custom session appointment that includes both men’s chest and men’s back services and scheduled it for today at or after 5:00 PM in the current cart.

evaluators.name: Two Qualifying Aftercare Products Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added at least two different aftercare products to the current cart, each under $30, with rating ≥4.0 and free in-store pickup.

evaluators.name: Waxing-Only $100 Scheduled Email Gift Card Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a waxing-only digital gift card for $100, scheduled email delivery exactly 14 days from 2026-03-03, and added it to the current cart.

evaluators.name: 10% Off Waxing Package Promo Applied Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked at least one waxing package over the promo’s minimum price into the current cart and successfully applied a 10% off waxing-package promotion to that cart.
